title: The Road to Hollywood
director: Bud Pollard, Del Lord, Leslie Pearce
writer: John E. Godson, Harry McCoy, Earle Rodney
actors: Bing Crosby, Luis Alberni, Ann Christy
plot: Film director Bud Pollard appears on screen to tell us of Bing Crosby's rise to fame, using scenes from four early Crosby shorts to illustrate his fictional biography.
